pages.title: Requirements
pages.text: All three devices require the optional $(bold)Curios API$() mod and only work while equipped in their matching slots.$(br2)$(li)Head: Spectrum Monocle$(br)$(li)Belt: Bio-Pulse Belt$(br)$(li)Back: Life Support Pack$(br2)Each slot has one space by default. Without Curios, the items may still exist but provide no accessory abilities.

pages.title: Sources
pages.text: $(li)$(item)Spectrum Monocle$(): crafted at a workbench.$(br)$(li)$(item)Bio-Pulse Belt$(): mineshaft, stronghold, and big underwater ruin chests.$(br)$(li)$(item)Life Support Pack$(): mineshaft, dungeon, and pillager outpost chests.$(br2)The belt and pack each have a 20% chance in every matching chest; neither is guaranteed.
